title: schoenus rivularis
intro: Schoenus rivularis, also known as the river clubrush or river club-sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and infections. The Schoenus rivularis plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and skin infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various health issues, including wounds and skin irritations.
